title: More Sulfur
description: Adds a lot more blocks that the sulfur cube can absorb
body:
# More Sulfer
This Mod/Datapack allows the sulfer cube to absorb any block you could dream of and some have functions. Currently there is dynamic lighting for full light blocks. There is a lot more but have FUN

<details>
<summary>Absorbable Blocks With Functions</summary>
- Cactus
- Most Full Light Blocks

</details>
